text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hey, you wanna play RDLI again?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that one day we hung out, Narita Taishin
and I have been battling each other on RDLI
regularly.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm getting bored beating you every time. It's
gotten to the point where I think I'm kind of done
with this game entirely...
choice_data_list: Fine, this'll be our last match, but I'm not losing!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You seem pretty sure of yourself.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Whatever. Let's finish this for good, then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a reason I'm so confident, and that's
because I met up with one of her close friends for
advice on how to win. That person was...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: The way to beat Taishin is...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Just trying really, really hard!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yep! The key to anything is having the right
mindset!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Taishin's not the most open person in the world,
which can be tough...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But she's not a bad person either! So all you gotta
do is be persistent!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But wow, I'm so glad Taishin has you as her
trainer! You really care about her so much!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ooooh! I'm sooo happy!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I know this might be a tall ask, but please take
good care of her!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Please, oh please, oh pleeeaaase!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, we really didn't talk
much about the game itself. What's important is...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Uh, you ready? Let's start.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And the final result of our fierce match is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: YOU LOSE.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wow, you still suck.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My final game against Narita Taishin is a
one-sided stomp.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It looked like you had some kind of strategy, but
you still lost... What were you doing anyway?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?
choice_data_list:
The secret to victory is willpower, so I just tried
really hard to win!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Pfft. The heck are you on about? You sound just
like Ticket—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: —I mean...
choice_data_list: Was that a chuckle I heard from you?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: N-no! You heard wrong!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh! I'm leaving.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I expect her to storm off after her mood worsens,
but instead, she stands there and stares at me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What are you just standing there for?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It hits me that she's waiting for me so we can
leave together. I've never felt closer to Narita
Taishin than I do in that moment.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you play games with Taishin—it all makes
sense now. I've been wondering why she's been in
such a good...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oops, don't mind me. Sorry, I'd love to give you
advice on how to beat her, but gaming is
unfortunately outside my area of expertise.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
However, I can give you information on Taishin
herself.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. There's nothing stopping you from
employing some tricks outside the game in order
to win.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Still, it won't be as easy as I make it out to be.
This is between you and me, but Taishin...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After stubbornly refusing to lose multiple battles,
we're thrown into sudden death. I can finally put
Biwa Hayahide's tip to use.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Grr, you just won't die, will you? Give up already.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Tch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide told me that Narita Taishin clicks
her tongue when she's impatient, and that's when
I should strike if I want to win!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What? Hey! What are you—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: YOU WIN!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...No way.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You won? Against me?! Did I seriously just lose to a low-rank noob like you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She mumbles to herself in disbelief, apparently
very shocked by her loss.
choice_data_list: Thanks for playing with me one last time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What do you mean? Oh, right. I did say that...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Wait.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
That was a fluke. You only won because I messed
up, and I'm not gonna let things end like this.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I challenge you to a rematch!
choice_data_list: But you said that was the last time...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You want to entertain me, right? Then keep
gaming with me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ngh! That's not what I said! Come on, let's play
already!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This isn't exactly how I thought things would go,
but I feel a little closer to Narita Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm not gonna let the score end this way! No more
holding back—you're dead!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At least, I think we're closer?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wow! So you're trying to entertain her with
some fun playtime?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: What a nice trainer you are! Oh, yes-you-are!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, that Taishin can be just a little—and I do mean just a tiny bit—difficult to handle, but that's what makes her so charming!
choice_data_list:
You're right, but that's not what I wanted to
talk abo—

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Where are my manners? You wait right here,
and I'll go make us some tea.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I hardly ever get the chance to talk to someone
else about little Taishin after all.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: No need to be polite! You just sit back and relax.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: There, there! You're such a nice trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, I didn't learn anything
at all from Super Creek!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Why are you sweating bullets out of nowhere?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Whatever. Let's just start.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Swish! Slash, slash! Pow!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Heh.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin is on fire, and I can't think of any
countermeasures to stave her off. I'm fighting for
my life!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just when I think I'm doomed to lose, the screen
displays a message.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Dang it. Time's up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Time runs out, and we end in a draw.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Usually, she's all about going on the offensive,
but this time, she mostly observed and hardly
attacked.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I just wanted to see what you were up to.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You seemed so sure of yourself, so I wanted to
see what kind of strategy you had up your
sleeves.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fact that she purposefully held back to give
me a chance to win really touches me. Without
realizing, I suddenly blurt out...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Excuse you?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Nice? Kid? Are you joking?
choice_data_list:
(Oh no, Super Creek's way of talking rubbed off
on me!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I brace myself for the barrage of angry insults
headed my way... but they never come.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Don't treat me like a child. Sheesh.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her words are harsh, but she doesn't seem angry.
Normally, she hates being treated like a kid...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Look, if you didn't get to do your strategy, we
can play again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: For some reason, she's a lot nicer than normal.
